element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic ground navigation before aerial challenges
Primary weapon for small enemies throughout early game
Critical resource management; introduced before mandatory ocean crossing

element_introduction_order.element: Jet fighter mode with altitude restrictions
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Ocean crossing between grassland and desert
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Mandatory vertical axis movement; crash risk teaches altitude awareness
Required for boss encounters; introduces timing/charging mechanic
First mandatory boss; aerial combat zone with no crash consequences
Final stage; no crash penalty during aerial phase; different spatial rules
Concludes game arc; designed for mastery of all prior mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching ground level with solid terrain
typical_tension_triggers: Low altitude flight over ocean (crash risk)
Transition between ground and aerial zones
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension through resource scarcity and mode transitions; relief via ground phases and fuel collection; escalation through two major environmental shifts (grassland→desert→ocean→space)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to robot movement and basic laser combat; fuel system learned through abundance; safe ground-based encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mandatory ocean crossing forces jet mastery; fuel scarcity increases pressure; desert stage presents sustained enemy patterns; Big-Bang mechanic required for progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Extended space phase with minimal ground shelter; boss battles in aerial zone; final superweapon demands full mechanic integration
notable_spikes: First forced jet transformation (ocean crossing) - introduces altitude management risk
STV boss encounter - first mandatory Big-Bang usage and aerial boss pattern learning
Space stage transition - removal of ground safety zone changes survival strategy

notable_level_patterns.description: Ocean areas act as mandatory transformation checkpoints between safe ground phases and dangerous aerial phases; fuel becomes critical; forces player to coordinate mode-switching with navigation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Ocean between grassland and desert; ocean before STV boss

notable_level_patterns.description: Boss battles occur exclusively in air; no fuel drain during boss; low altitude flight still carries crash risk if terrain present; requires mastery of Big-Bang charging while managing altitude
notable_level_patterns.example_level: STV boss arena; alien superweapon arena

notable_level_patterns.description: Two-act structure: Earth arc (grassland→desert→ocean) then Space arc (single extended ground phase→bottomless sky); space lacks ground safety net, intensifying resource management
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Grassland; Desert; Space outer-ground; Space aerial
